members.name: Eugene Chan
members.shortBio: Computer Engineer with hands-on experience in full-stack development, systems programming, and GPU acceleration.
members.bio: Final-year Computer Engineering student at CUHK and part-time Software Engineer at Efinix, building cross-platform apps with Python and Flutter. Passionate about systems programming, GPU acceleration, and — when away from the keyboard — lifting weights and gaming on Minecraft and CS.

workExperience.role: Part-time Software Engineer at Efinix, Inc.
description: Continued cross-platform app development in Python and Flutter alongside core engineering team
Collaborated closely with fellow engineers to design, review, and iterate on features, gaining exposure to production-level engineering practices and code standards

workExperience.role: Software Engineer Intern at Efinix, Inc.
description: Developed cross-platform Windows/Linux desktop applications using Python and Flutter
Independently designed and shipped major features that significantly improved end-user experience and workflow efficiency

workExperience.role: Programming Intern at Media Explorer Limited
description: Aided in updating e-Commerce solution using JSP and HTML
Developed new features for clubhouse management system using SpringBoot

projects.name: GPU Accelerated FX/FXCH (ongoing)
projects.description: Optimized the FXCH module in ABC (UC Berkeley's sequential synthesis & verification system) by parallelizing subcube comparisons using CUDA, achieving significant performance gains on medium-to-large logic designs.

projects.name: BlackEye Valkyrie System (2025)
projects.description: Architected a lightweight web-based Clinical Management System for hospital management in remote areas, built with Spring Boot, MongoDB, Java, and JavaScript.

projects.name: Motion Controlled Laser Turret (2024)
projects.description: Engineered a gyroscope-operated laser turret on the Tiva C Launchpad with wireless controller-turret communication over Bluetooth via UART, programmed entirely in C.

hobbies.name: Counter-Strike
hobbies.description: Competing and grinding ranked matches — one of the games that sharpened my strategic thinking and reaction time.

hobbies.name: Minecraft
hobbies.description: Building ambitious structures and running a private server with friends — creativity without limits.

hobbies.name: Escape from Tarkov
hobbies.description: Spending 40 minutes in my stash, 10 minutes in queue, and get head-eyes'd 2 minutes into a raid. Repeated for 4000 hours.

hobbies.name: Counter-Strike
hobbies.description: Whiffing entire mags and baiting friends. Never give me the a4.
